title: Trying On a Jacket
description: Browse a clothing store, try on a jacket, and check the return policy.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Hi, let me know if you need any help finding a size.

templates.text: Actually yes, do you have this jacket in a medium?
templates.hint_zh: 其實我想問一下,這件外套有中號嗎?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Let me check the back. Is the navy color okay or are you looking at the green one?

templates.text: I prefer the navy. The green is a little too bright for me.
templates.hint_zh: 我比較想要海軍藍,綠色對我來說太亮了一點。

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Got it, one second. Here you go, the fitting rooms are over to the right.

templates.text: Thanks. By the way, is this on sale or full price?
templates.hint_zh: 謝謝。對了,這件是特價還是原價?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: It's twenty percent off this week, including the navy.

templates.text: Oh nice, that's a good deal. What's your return policy?
templates.hint_zh: 喔不錯,折扣不錯。退換貨規則是什麼?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Thirty days with the receipt, even on sale items. Tags need to be on, though.

templates.text: Perfect, that gives me time to try it at home too.
templates.hint_zh: 太好了,這樣我也能帶回家試穿。

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Exactly. Just hold on to your receipt and you're good.

templates.text: Got it. I'll go try it on now, thanks for your help.
templates.hint_zh: 了解,我先去試穿,謝謝你。
